inputs.label: Bore Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Inner diameter of the pneumatic cylinder bore

inputs.label: Rod Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the piston rod (0 for rodless cylinder)

inputs.label: Working Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Gauge pressure of compressed air supply

inputs.label: Stroke Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance the piston travels per cycle

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Recommended additional force percentage for selection

formulas.freeAirPerMinute: ((Math.PI * Math.pow(boreDiameter / 2, 2) * stroke + (Math.PI * Math.pow(boreDiameter / 2, 2) - Math.PI * Math.pow(rodDiameter / 2, 2)) * stroke) / 1000000) * (pressure + 1) * cyclesPerMinute
